title: tragacantha grisea
intro: Tragacantha grisea, also known as the Grey Goat's-thorn or Slender Goat's-thorn, is a type of plant in the Fabaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and as a diuretic. Tragacantha grisea is said to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and alleviating symptoms of arthritis due to its flavonoid and saponin content. Herbal preparations of Tragacantha grisea can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support kidney and liver health.
